name: Qiming Information Technology Co.,Ltd
summary: Qiming Information Technology Co.,Ltd provides products and services in the areas of smart manufacturing, smart cars, and smart cities in China. The company's management software products include ERP, intelligent manufacturing, smart logistics, collaborative office, basic research and development, market consulting service, big data value-added application, and industrial Internet platform, as well as management software implementation services. It also provides intelligent networking, new energy, vehicle diagnostic, automotive electronic testing, and electronic and electrical architecture development services. In addition, the company offers smart logistics, smart transportation, and car information security services; and Qiming Cloud platform solution. Further, it provides solutions for vehicle manufacturers, including electronic and electrical design and integration testing, diagnostic communication development, comfort system electronic control unit development, battery system design and trial production, trial engineering, high-voltage electrical design, powertrain test and system solution verification, control strategy consulting, power system design, and MBD and integration testing services. Qiming Information Technology Co.,Ltd was founded in 2000 and is based in Changchun, China.
